case_title: MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION VS. GREGORY BROWN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, GREGORY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 125 SIXTH ST., #411, SF, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION"
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR JUDGMENT AND WRIT OF EXECUTION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, GREGORY DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWN, GREGORY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY $8.40 PER DAY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, GREGORY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR SERVICE OF SUMMONS BY POSTING; ORDER TO SERVE SUMMONS BY POSTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWN, GREGORY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, GREGORY
